description: Volatility 3 is the world's most advanced memory forensics framework. It supports Windows, Linux, and macOS memory dumps.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/volatility3 && python3 volatility3.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/volatility3 && python3 volatility3.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/volatility3 && python3 volatility3.py --help`. Memory forensics framework (v3).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the post_exploitation category. Fits when the engagement needs: Memory forensics framework (v3).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Memory forensics framework (v3).
